title: Enquiry
description: Reach out to us via WhatsApp or phone. Tell us about your project idea, requirements, and any reference images you have in mind.

title: Requirement Understanding
description: We discuss your needs in detail — dimensions, style preferences, material choices, budget range, and timeline expectations.

title: Site Visit
description: Our team visits your location to take measurements, assess the space, and understand any structural or design constraints.

title: Plan Discussion
description: We present design options and layout plans based on your requirements and site conditions. Revisions are welcome at this stage.

title: Material Selection
description: Choose from our range of materials — solid wood, plywood, MDF, WPC, laminates, or veneers — with guidance on durability and budget.

title: Quotation
description: Receive a detailed quotation covering material costs, labour charges, hardware, and finishing. No hidden charges — everything is transparent.

title: Contract & Advance
description: Once you approve the quote, we finalize the agreement and collect the initial advance payment to begin procurement.

title: Timeline Planning
description: We provide a clear project timeline with milestones so you know exactly when each phase will be completed.

title: Execution & Updates
description: Work begins at our workshop. We send regular progress photos and updates via WhatsApp so you stay informed throughout.

title: Delivery & Installation
description: Finished items are delivered and professionally installed at your location. We ensure everything fits perfectly and functions smoothly.

title: Feedback & Support
description: After installation, we follow up to ensure you are satisfied. Our warranty covers craftsmanship, and we are always a message away for support.
